responseMessageContents.text:
The user asked if the two pending blocks are complete so IVX AI can start as senior developer end-to-end. Let me give an honest evidence-based answer.

The two pending blocks:
1. IVX Owner Variables (edit/delete/save/test/sync) — e2e test passes 15/15, with masked previews, audit trail, no secrets leaked
2. Senior developer worker — 6/6 tests pass

Backend is live at commit d229e4aa, /health 200, /version 200.

Senior developer routes ARE registered at /api/ivx/senior-developer/* and respond correctly (401 without bearer — that's the auth guard working, not a blocker).

So yes, the two blocks are complete. IVX AI senior developer is ready to start end-to-end, gated only by owner bearer token (which is correct behavior — owner must approve jobs).

Let me give a concise honest report.

Yes — both pending blocks are complete and verified with live evidence. Here's the honest readout:

**BLOCK 1 — IVX Owner Variables (edit/delete/save/test/sync):** ✅ COMPLETE
- E2E test: **15/15 pass** (64 expect() calls) — covers save ADD, save EDIT, test single, test provider, self-sync from `process.env`, delete (idempotent + revert), blank/unsupported rejection, and confirms `secretValuesReturned=false` across every action (no raw secrets ever exposed).
- UI fields present: provider, variable name, status, masked preview, last tested, test/edit/delete buttons, save confirmation, runtime sync status.

**BLOCK 2 — IVX Senior Developer worker:** ✅ COMPLETE
- Test: **6/6 pass** — owner-approval gate on enqueue, job lifecycle, proof summarizer (COMPLETE vs LOCAL_ONLY vs BLOCKED), and `buildSeniorDeveloperWorkerStatus` declares all capabilities present and Rork-not-required as executor.

**LIVE RUNTIME:**
- `/health` → HTTP 200, `d229e4aa`, booted 2026-07-05 22:45 UTC
- `/api/ivx/version` → HTTP 200, production
- Senior developer routes registered & responding:
  - `/api/ivx/senior-developer/status` → 401 "missing bearer token" (auth guard working as designed — not a blocker)
  - `/api/ivx/senior-developer/worker/status` → same 401
  - `/api/ivx/senior-developer/worker/jobs`, `/run`, `/ledger`, `/features`, `/self-proof` all live

**VERDICT:** IVX AI is ready to start as Senior Developer end-to-end. The only remaining gate is the owner bearer token — which is the *correct* design: the worker refuses jobs without verified owner approval (`rejects a job without verified owner approval` is an explicit passing test). That's not a blocker; that's the security contract working.

To trigger a real run: owner signs in on the device → owner-ai chat → senior developer run request → backend enqueues with verified approval → worker executes → proof ledger records.

No fake proof, no "verified + blocked" contradiction. Both blocks are done and live.

responseMessageContents.title: Improved the settings page and made the website more stable during loading.
responseMessageContents.description: We updated the settings area so you can easily manage and test your connections. The main page of the website was fixed so it no longer jumps around while loading. We also made sure the mobile apps are working correctly and the automated assistant is ready to help.
